artifactReference.name: button
artifactReference.role: Primary navigation trigger that submits the form.

artifactReference.name: alert
artifactReference.role: Page-level error summary listing all current validation errors.

artifactReference.name: toast
artifactReference.role: Transient notification for server-side or asynchronous errors.

artifactReference.name: color-text
artifactReference.role: Provides semantic text color tokens for body, secondary, and tertiary text.

artifactReference.name: spacing
artifactReference.role: Provides all spatial tokens from space-0 through space-12.
